message:
test(e2e): Add Team Workflow E2E test (bead 9jgu)

Tests team collaboration patterns with repo-level playbooks:
- Lead creates repo with init --repo
- Lead adds project-scoped rules to .cass/playbook.yaml
- Lead commits and pushes
- Dev clones repo and sees merged rules
- Mark feedback updates repo playbook
- Stats and list reflect combined global+repo rules

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
